title: NCRTC NETRA Jobs 2026 - Apply Online for Chief Executive Officer Posts
description: The NCRTC Express Transit (NETRA) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancy for 01 Chief Executive Officer post. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech can apply for the NCRTC NETRA Jobs 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selection process, application fee, salary...
